aws.appstream.resource.fleet_default_int.metadata_intent: Check that AppStream fleets have default internet access disabled (EnableDefaultInternetAccess = false)
issues_found: Discovery was using describe_app_block_builders instead of describe_fleets
Emit structure was incorrect - needed items_for pattern for array response
fixes_applied: Changed discovery from aws.appstream.describe_app_block_builders to aws.appstream.describe_fleets
Updated emit to use items_for pattern: items_for: '{{ response.Fleets }}'
Updated all emit field mappings to use item.* instead of response.Fleets.*
